design_concepts.design_title: America 250 Faith Family Freedom Shirts: Seasonal Approval Asset Package
design_concepts.design_concept: A coordinated family or church-group apparel design that feels warm, modern, and photo-ready for Etsy listing mockups. Hunter offer context: Launch commemorative America 250 faith/family/freedom shirt and sweatshirt designs with optional family name/year.
design_concepts.art_direction: Stacked badge layout with subtle rays, hand-lettered faith phrase, and adaptable placement for adult, youth, and toddler shirts.
design_concepts.typography_suggestions: Friendly bold serif headline paired with rounded sans-serif supporting text; preserve readability at shirt-print distance.
